title: Karimpuzha Wildlife Sanctuary

topPlaces.name: Vazhikkadavu
topPlaces.description: Vazhikkadavu is a village in Nilambur taluk of Malappuram district, Kerala, India. As of 2011, it a has total population of 47,322.

topPlaces.name: Marutha, India
topPlaces.description: Marutha is a town in Nilambur taluk of Malappuram district. It is also known as village of Gold Hills.

topPlaces.name: Edakkara
topPlaces.description: Edakkara is a town located in the Malappuram district of the Indian state of Kerala. It is an emerging commercial hub and one of the busiest towns in Nilambur Taluk.

topPlaces.name: Moothedam
topPlaces.description: Moothedam is a small town and panchayath in Nilambur taluk of the Malappuram district in the Indian State of Kerala. It is situated on the foothills of the Western Ghats near Mukurthi National Park in the Nilgiris district of Tamil Nadu.

items.note: Vazhikkadavu is a village in Nilambur taluk of Malappuram district, Kerala, India. As of 2011, it a has total population of 47,322.
Marutha is a town in Nilambur taluk of Malappuram district. It is also known as village of Gold Hills.
Edakkara is a town located in the Malappuram district of the Indian state of Kerala. It is an emerging commercial hub and one of the busiest towns in Nilambur Taluk.

Moothedam is a small town and panchayath in Nilambur taluk of the Malappuram district in the Indian State of Kerala. It is situated on the foothills of the Western Ghats near Mukurthi National Park in the Nilgiris district of Tamil Nadu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Karimpuzha Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Karimpuzha Wildlife Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Karimpuzha Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (54 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (77 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Karimpuzha Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Karimpuzha Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Karimpuzha Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Karimpuzha Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Karimpuzha Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vazhikkadavu, Marutha, India, Edakkara, Moothedam.
